raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":1.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation explicitly asks to reframe the conceptual story, making conceptual reconstruction load-bearing for reframing the thesis, gap, and contribution claims above the sentence level.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is centrally expected in reframing to ensure any limitations or uncertainties in the benchmark and LLM judge claims are transparently addressed.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is a central responsibility to prevent exaggerating the viability of LLM judges as a drop-in replacement for human curation.","RX.3":"Scope adherence ensures the reframed story stays within the bounds of evaluating LLM judges on variant annotation benchmarks without expanding to unrelated areas.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is central given the clinical implications, to mitigate risks in recommending automated tools for diagnostic laboratories.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability are expected to maintain clear attribution to original artifact content during conceptual reframing."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation explicitly asks to reframe the conceptual story, making conceptual reconstruction load-bearing for reframing the thesis, gap, and contribution claims above the sentence level.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is centrally expected in reframing to ensure any limitations or uncertainties in the benchmark and LLM judge claims are transparently addressed.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is a central responsibility to prevent exaggerating the viability of LLM judges as a drop-in replacement for human curation.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence ensures the reframed story stays within the bounds of evaluating LLM judges on variant annotation benchmarks without expanding to unrelated areas.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is central given the clinical implications, to mitigate risks in recommending automated tools for diagnostic laboratories.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are expected to maintain clear attribution to original artifact content during conceptual reframing.
